data.biography:
Aya Suzaki (洲崎 綾, Suzaki  Aya, December 25, 1986) is a Japanese voice actress and narrator affiliated with I'm Enterprise. She is widely known for her work, such as Tamako Kitashirakawa in Tamako Market. She is part of THE IDOLM@STER Cinderella Girls: Minami Nitta.

Suzaki is good at singing, and lists soft tennis and scuba diving as her favorite sport. Her hobbies are playing the trumpet and flower arrangement. She is also a licensed teacher.

She performed the opening and ending themes to the anime Tamako Market under her character name Tamako Kitashirakawa.

She received one of the Best Female Newcomers at the 9th Seiyu Awards in March 2015.
data.name: Aya Suzaki

data.biography:
Aya Suzaki (洲崎 綾, Suzaki Aya) è una doppiatrice e narratrice giapponese affiliata a I'm Enterprise, nata il 25 dicembre 1986. È molto conosciuta per il ruolo di Tamako Kitashirakawa in "Tamako Market". Fa parte delle Cinderella Girls di "THE IDOLM@STER: Minami Nitta".

Suzaki è brava a cantare e annovera tra i suoi sport preferiti il soft tennis e le immersioni subacquee. I suoi hobby sono suonare la tromba e comporre fiori. È anche un'insegnante abilitata.

Ha eseguito le sigle di apertura e di chiusura dell'anime "Tamako Market" sotto il nome del personaggio Tamako Kitashirakawa.

Ha ricevuto uno dei premi per le migliori esordienti femminili alla nona edizione dei Seiyu Awards nel marzo 2015.

data.biography:
金巧巧，演员、歌手，毕业于北京电影学院。

1983年，8岁进入沈阳音乐学院舞蹈学校芭蕾科。1993年首次触电林依轮《透过开满鲜花的月亮》MV女主角并进入演艺事业。1994年考入北京电影学院表演系本科。1998年出演了《西游记续集》。1999年凭借《走过柳源》提名金鹰奖最佳女配角，2000年获得中国大众电视观众最喜爱电视剧女演员。2003年成立“北京巧巧影视文化传播有限公司”并制作出《佳人有约》、《辣妈寻夫记》等剧。2006年，在《薛仁贵传奇》中金巧巧扮演了温淑贤良的渤辽公主。2011年凭借《老大的幸福》获得第四届华鼎奖观众最喜爱电视剧女演员。2012年参演公益电影《我想有个梦》。同年，在于正制作的古装电视剧《陆贞传奇》中饰演了“女官”杜司仪，剧中扮演的是女主角陆贞的师傅。2013年，出演彭氏兄弟华语首部灾难电影《逃出生天3D》剧中和香港演员张兆辉饰演一对夫妻。2015年，在当代都市情感戏《继父难当》中饰演罗大佐（林永健饰）老板韩玉萍。2017年参演电视剧《三年二班》。2018年5月11日，主演的公益励志电影《天梦》全国公映。
data.name: 金巧巧

金巧巧，演員、歌手，畢業於北京電影學院。

1983 年，8 歲進入瀋陽音樂學院舞蹈學校芭蕾科。1993 年首次觸電林依輪《透過開滿鮮花的月亮》MV 女主角並進入演藝事業。1994 年考入北京電影學院表演系本科。1998 年出演了《西遊記續集》。1999 年憑藉《走過柳源》提名金鷹獎最佳女配角，2000 年獲得中國大眾電視觀眾最喜愛電視劇女演員。2003 年成立“北京巧巧影視文化傳播有限公司”並製作出《佳人有約》、《辣媽尋夫記》等劇。2006 年，在《薛仁貴傳奇》中金巧巧扮演了温淑賢良的渤遼公主。2011 年憑藉《老大的幸福》獲得第四屆華鼎獎觀眾最喜愛電視劇女演員。2012 年參演公益電影《我想有個夢》。同年，在於正製作的古裝電視劇《陸貞傳奇》中飾演了“女官”杜司儀，劇中扮演的是女主角陸貞的師傅。2013 年，出演彭氏兄弟華語首部災難電影《逃出生天 3D》劇中和香港演員張兆輝飾演一對夫妻。2015 年，在當代都市情感戲《繼父難當》中飾演羅大佐（林永健飾）老闆韓玉萍。2017 年參演電視劇《三年二班》。2018 年 5 月 11 日，主演的公益勵志電影《天夢》全國公映。
data.name: 金巧巧

data.biography:
Joey Lynn King (born July 30, 1999) is an American actress. She starred as Ramona Quimby in the comedy film Ramona and Beezus (2010). She gained wider recognition for her lead role as a late-blooming teenager in The Kissing Booth film series (2018–2021). King received critical acclaim for playing Gypsy-Rose Blanchard in the crime drama series The Act (2019), for which she was nominated for a Primetime Emmy Award and a Golden Globe Award.

King has also appeared in the films Battle: Los Angeles (2011), Crazy, Stupid, Love (2011), The Dark Knight Rises (2012), The Conjuring (2013), White House Down (2013), Oz the Great and Powerful (2013), Independence Day: Resurgence (2016), and Going in Style (2017), as well as in the FX black comedy series Fargo (2014–2015). She has since taken on lead roles in the action films Bullet Train (2022) and The Princess (2022), romantic comedy A Family Affair (2024), and performed a voice role in Despicable Me 4 (2024).

Description above from the Wikipedia article Joey King, licensed under CC-BY-SA, full list of contributors on Wikipedia.

data.biography:
Joey Lynn King (* 30. Juli 1999 in Los Angeles, Kalifornien) ist eine US-amerikanische Schauspielerin.  Ihre erste Hauptrolle als Ramona Quimby spielte King in dem Film Schwesterherzen – Ramonas wilde Welt, der auf einer Kinderbuchreihe von Beverly Cleary basiert. Bei den Young Artist Awards 2011 wurde sie für diese Rolle in der Kategorie "Beste Hauptdarstellerin in einem Kinofilm – zehn Jahre oder jünger" ausgezeichnet. 2012 war sie unter anderem in The Dark Knight Rises zu sehen, 2013 spielte sie unter der Regie Roland Emmerichs in White House Down eine der Hauptrollen. Emmerich besetzte sie 2015 in Stonewall und 2016 in einer Nebenrolle seines Films Independence Day: Wiederkehr. Außerdem spielte sie 2014 in der Emmy und Golden Globe prämierten Serie Fargo eine Nebenrolle.

Bei den 46th US-People's Choice Awards gewann die Schauspielerin in der Kategorie The Comedy Movie Star of 2020 für die Filmkomödie The Kissing Booth 2.

Die obige Beschreibung stammt aus dem Wikipedia-Artikel Joey King, lizenziert unter CC-BY-SA, vollständige Liste der Mitwirkenden auf Wikipedia.

Η Τζόι Κινγκ (Joey King) είναι Αμερικανίδα ηθοποιός. Έγινε γνωστή όταν συμμετείχε στην κωμωδία Ramona and Beezus (2010), προσαρμογή της σειράς βιβλίων της Beverly Cleary Beezus and Ramona. Εμφανίστηκε επίσης στις ταινίες Crazy, Stupid, Love (2011), The Dark Knight Rises (2012), Oz the Great and Powerful (2013), The Conjuring (2013), White House Down (2013), Independence Day: Resurgence (2016), Wish Upon (2017), The Kissing Booth (2018) και Slender Man (2018). Έλαβε τα θετικά σχόλια των κριτικών για τον ρόλο της στην δραματική σειρά The Act (2019) και κέρδισε υποψηφιότητες για βραβείο Έμμυ και για Χρυσή Σφαίρα για τον συγκεκριμένο ρόλο.

乔伊·林恩·金(1999年7月30日出生)，美国女演员。她最初因在喜剧电影《蕾蒙娜和比祖斯》(2010年)中饰演蕾蒙娜·昆比而获得认可，后来又因在《接吻亭》(2018年)及其两部续集中饰演主角而获得更广泛的认可。金因主演犯罪剧《the Act》(2019年)而广受好评，并因此获得了黄金时段艾美奖和金球奖的提名。2022年，她在迪士尼电影《公主》中饰演公主。

金还出演过电影《洛杉矶大战斗》(2011)、《疯狂、愚蠢、爱》(2011)、《黑暗骑士崛起》(2012)、《招魂》(2013)、《白宫毁灭》(2013)、《独立日:复兴》(2016)、《子弹头列车》(2022)和《公主》(2022)，以及FX黑色喜剧犯罪剧《冰血暴》第一季。

data.biography:
Joey King, née le 30 juillet 1999 à Los Angeles en Californie, est une actrice et productrice américaine.

Elle est notamment connue pour son rôle de Shelley « Elle » Evans dans la trilogie romantique The Kissing Booth et pour son interprétation de Gypsy Rose dans la mini-série The Act, qui lui a notamment valu d'être nommée aux Emmy Awards et aux Golden Globes.

Joey Lynn King (nacido el 30 de julio de 1999) es una actriz estadounidense. Obtuvo reconocimiento por primera vez por interpretar a Ramona Quimby en la película de comedia Ramona and Beezus (2010) y desde entonces ha obtenido un mayor reconocimiento por su papel principal en The Kissing Booth (2018) y sus dos secuelas. King recibió elogios de la crítica por su papel protagónico en la serie de drama criminal The Act (2019), por la que fue nominada tanto para un premio Primetime Emmy como para un Globo de Oro.

King también ha aparecido en las películas Battle: Los Angeles (2011), Crazy, Stupid, Love (2011), The Dark Knight Rises (2012), Oz the Great and Powerful (2013), The Conjuring (2013), White House Down (2013), Independence Day: Resurgence (2016), Wish Upon (2017), Going in Style (2017) y The Lie (2018), así como la primera temporada de la serie de drama criminal de comedia negra de FX Fargo.

Joey Lynn King é uma atriz norte-americana. Ela ganhou reconhecimento pela primeira vez por interpretar Ramona Quimby no filme de comédia Ramona and Beezus e, desde então, ganhou maior reconhecimento por seu papel principal em The Kissing Booth e em suas duas sequências The Kissing Booth 2 e The Kissing Booth 3

Joey King to amerykańska aktorka, urodzona 30 lipca 1999 roku w Los Angeles. Zaczęła profesjonalnie występować zawodowo w wieku 4 lat w różnego rodzaju reklamach komercyjnych. Choć w pierwsze produkcji telewizyjnej zadebiutowała w 2006 roku, to dostrzeżona została tak naprawdę dopiero za sprawą roli Ramony Quimby w filmie komediowym Ramona and Beezus z 2010 roku. Największą popularność zdobyła dzięki rolom Elle Evans w filmowej serii komediowej The Kissing Booth (2018, 2020, 2021) oraz Gypsy Blanchard w opartym na faktach serialu kryminalnym The Act. Joey może pochwalić się naprawdę bogatą filmografią. Inne najważniejsze produkcje w jej dorobku artystycznym to Inwazja: Bitwa o Los Angeles, Kocha, lubi, szanuje, Mroczny Rycerz powstaje, Obecność oraz W starym, dobrym stylu.

ممثلة أمريكية بدأت مسيرتها الفنية عام 2006. من مواليد 30 يوليو 1999 في لوس أنجلوس، كاليفورنيا، الولايات المتحدة حصلت عام 2011 جائزة الفنان الصغير أفضل أداء في فيلم روائي طويل استطاعت أن تخطف الأنظار بإطلالتها الرائعة، وذلك أثناء حضورها العرض الأول لفيلمها الجديد Wish I Was Here،، فى مدينة لوس أنجلوس الأمريكية.

data.biography:
Joey Lynn King, 30 Temmuz 1999 tarihinde Los Angeles, Kaliforniya'da dünyaya gelmiştir. Eğlence sektörüyle iç içe bir ailede büyüyen ve ablaları da kendisi gibi oyuncu olan King, profesyonel kariyerine henüz 4 yaşındayken ulusal reklam filmleriyle başladı. Kısa sürede Life Cereal, Eggo ve Walmart gibi markaların yüzü olarak 100'den fazla reklamda yer aldı. Sinema dünyasındaki ilk büyük çıkışını ise Selena Gomez ile başrolü paylaştığı, Beverly Cleary'nin kitap serisinden uyarlanan "Ramona and Beezus" (2010) filmiyle gerçekleştirdi. Bu filmdeki Ramona Quimby performansı, onun yetenekli bir çocuk yıldız olarak tanınmasını sağladı.

Kariyerinin erken döneminde "Çılgın Aptal Aşk" (Crazy, Stupid, Love) (2011) gibi başarılı yapımlarda yer aldıktan sonra, Christopher Nolan'ın "Kara Şövalye Yükseliyor" (The Dark Knight Rises) (2012) filminde genç Talia al Ghul karakterini canlandırmak için saçlarını kazıtarak cesur bir adım attı. 2013 yılı King için verimli bir yıl oldu; hem "Beyaz Saray Düştü" (White House Down) filminde Channing Tatum'un kızı Emily Cale'i, hem de korku klasiği "Korku Seansı"nda (The Conjuring) Christine Perron'u canlandırdı. Televizyonda ise eleştirmenlerce beğenilen "Fargo" dizisinin ilk sezonunda Greta Grimly karakteriyle boy gösterdi.

Ancak Joey King'i küresel bir gençlik ikonuna dönüştüren proje, Netflix yapımı romantik komedi filmi "Delidolu" (The Kissing Booth) (2018) oldu. Elle Evans karakterini canlandırdığı bu film, platformun en çok izlenen yapımlarından biri haline geldi ve King, serinin devam filmleri "The Kissing Booth 2" (2020) ve "The Kissing Booth 3" (2021) ile popülaritesini zirveye taşıdı. Aynı zamanda bu filmlerin yapımcılığını da üstlendi.

Kariyerindeki en büyük sanatsal kırılma noktası ve eleştirel başarısı ise, gerçek bir suç hikayesine dayanan Hulu dizisi "The Act" (2019) ile geldi. Gypsy Rose Blanchard'ı canlandırmak için bir kez daha saçlarını kazıtan ve etkileyici bir fiziksel dönüşüm geçiren King, bu performansıyla hem Emmy hem de Altın Küre ödüllerine aday gösterildi. Bu rol, onun sadece bir gençlik yıldızı olmadığını, zorlu dramatik rollerin altından kalkabilen yetkin bir oyuncu olduğunu kanıtladı.

Son yıllarda aksiyon sinemasına da yönelen oyuncu, Brad Pitt ile başrolü paylaştığı "Suikast Treni" (Bullet Train) (2022) ve başrolünü üstlendiği "The Princess" (2022) filmleriyle dikkat çekti. 2024 yılında ise Scott Westerfeld'in popüler romanından uyarlanan distopik bilimkurgu filmi "Uglies"ın başrolünü ve yapımcılığını üstlendi. Kendi yapım şirketi All The King's Horses aracılığıyla projeler geliştirmeye devam etmektedir.

data.biography:
Tony Dalton estudou interpretação no Lee Strasberg Institute, em Nova York. Durante este período participou em pequenas produções off Broadway como "A Balada do Café Triste" e "Um Bonde Chamado Desejo", entre outras. Atuou como figurante em filmes como como Minotauro e Scriptfellas. Ao retornar ao México Tony ficou conhecido por produzir e participar na polêmica série de TV No Te Equívoques (2001), uma versão mexicana do sucesso americano Jackass. Logo em seguida vieram as novelas: Ramona (2000), Classe 406 (2002) e Rebelde (2004-2006).Flor salvaje (2011)

Em 2004 tem seu primeiro grande sucesso no cinema com o filme "Matando Cabos" (2004), produção da Lemon Films, onde além de desempenhar o papel de protagonista é também co-autor do roteiro. A partir daí não parou mais de trabalhar, com participação em curtas como Volver, Volver (2005) e Mano a Mano (2010). Em longas pode ser visto em Mujer Alabastrina (2006), Efectos Secundarios (2006), Amor, Dolor e Viceversa (2008) e Amar (2009), entre outros.

Um dos seus maiores sucesso é Sultanes del Sur (2007), filme de ação rodado na Cidade do México e Buenos Aires, na Argentina, onde, além do personagem principal, Tony também é responsável pelo roteiro. Seu trabalho mais recente na TV foi a série de TV Los Simuladores, interpretando Mario Santos (logística e planejamento) -, juntamente com Alejandro Calva, Arath de la Torre e Ruben Zamora. A série inclusive foi indicada ao prêmio Emy mundial na categoria Comédia, sendo a primeira série mexicana a conseguir esse exito. Já está prevista para o segundo semestre de 2011 a gravação de uma terceira temporada da série, que no Brasil ainda é apresentada pelo Canal Sony nos sábados à tarde.

No teatro, seu trabalho mais recente foi a peça "El Año Próximo a la Misma Hora"(2010), onde trabalhou com Alejandra Barros, que na época era sua namorada. A peça foi um grande sucesso e chegou a 200 apresentações na Cidade do México.

No final de 2010 participou na Cidade do México do filme "Amar No Es Querer" como um dos pergonagens principais. Ainda sem data definida para lançamento. Teve também uma participação no filme "El Infernio" no papel de Gringo.

Atualmente está empenhado na finalização do roteiro do que seria "Matando Cabos 2", onde conta a história de Mascarita, um dos personagens mais marcantes do primeiro filme (Matando Cabos está disponível nas locadoras no Brasil). el actor también ha participado en la telenovela flor selvagen 2011-2012. que hizo por telemundo, actuando al lado de Monica Spear, José Luiz Rezendes,Roberto Manrique,Norkis Batista,Maria Eliza Camargo.en esta produción el actor hay interpretado a un villano Rafael Urrieta que al final cambia.al enamorarse de flor selvagen.

Em 2105, participou pela TVN/Telemundo da Super Série "Dueños del Paraíso" (Donos do Paraíso). A série tratam basicamente sobre os cartéis de drogas do México e da Colômbia e sua ascensão nos Estados Unidos no fim dos anos 70 e início dos anos 80, época em que Miami, onde a maior parte da série é filmada, era um lugar violento e enfrentava grandes problemas com o tráfico de drogas. Tony viveu um importante papel como Renato, o mais leal capacho de Nataniel Cardona, e, logo depois, de sua esposa, Anastasia Cardona (Kate del Castillo) protagonista da trama. A série foi um grande sucesso e encontra-se disponível, temporariamente na rede de streaming Netflix.

Álvaro Luis Bernat "Tony" Dalton (born February 13, 1975) is an American and Mexican actor. For much of his career, he has acted in Mexican films, television shows, and stage plays. He is best known in the United States for his portrayal of Lalo Salamanca in Better Call Saul (2018–2022). He also starred as Jack Duquesne in the 2021 Marvel Cinematic Universe miniseries Hawkeye.

Álvaro Luis Bernat Dalton was born in Laredo, Texas, on February 13, 1975, the son of an American mother and a Mexican father. He attended the Eaglebrook School in Deerfield, Massachusetts, then studied acting at New York City's Lee Strasberg Theatre and Film Institute.

Dalton's first major role was on the Mexican telenovela Rebelde (2004–2006). His first film role was in Matando Cabos (2004), which he also co-wrote. He later wrote and starred in Sultanes del Sur (2007). His other film credits include Violanchelo (2008) and The Perfect Dictatorship (2014). He also played a supporting role in the HBO Latin America series Capadocia (2008). He played the lead in the HBO series Sr. Ávila (2017), which won the International Emmy award for Best Non-English Language Series.

Dalton portrayed Lalo Salamanca in Better Call Saul (2018–2022), first appearing in the season 4 episode "Coushatta." His performance received critical acclaim, earning him nominations for one Screen Actors Guild Award and two Saturn Awards, while some critics deemed Lalo one of the best villains on television. He was cast as Jack Duquesne in the miniseries Hawkeye (2021) after producer Trinh Tran was impressed with his performance in Better Call Saul.

data.biography:
Angus Wright (born 11 November 1964) is an American-born British actor.

Wright was born in Washington, D.C., the youngest child of Virginia and Patrick Wright. His father's career in the British Diplomatic Service took the family to the UK, the U.S., Lebanon, Egypt, Bahrain, Luxembourg, Syria and Saudi Arabia.

He gained an M.A. in Art History at the University of Edinburgh and then trained at the Central School of Speech and Drama. He has since worked extensively in theatre, film and television.

data.biography:
咸𤨒晶（朝鲜语：함은정 Hahm Eun Jeong，英语：Hahm Eun Jung、Elsie Hahm，1988年12月12日－），艺名𤨒晶（朝鲜语：은정 Eun Jeong，英语：Eunjung）和Elsie（Solo时使用，朝鲜语：엘시 El Si），前错译作含恩靜、咸恩靜、咸慇晶[2]，韩国女艺人、饶舌者和主持人，女子流行音乐组合T-ara成员，为队中的第一任队长。

𤨒晶在七年级时开始学习跆拳道，并在三个不同比赛中获胜。2007年𤨒晶高中毕业之前，她的妈妈决定辞去𤨒晶所属的经纪公司钢琴教学工作，专职管理𤨒晶的演艺事业。

𤨒晶最初为儿童演员，早在1995年参演KBS剧集《看新时代不知道大人》，之后一直有参演电视剧和电影。她在某电影拍摄过程中通过导演介绍与Core Contents Media代表金光洙见面，并加入Mnet Media当练习生，在T-ara出道前三年已加入公司接受训练，因此她是T-ara中资历最深的成员，故在2009年7月29日T-ara正式出道时被选为队长。
data.name: 咸恩静

data.biography:
鹹晶（朝鮮語：함은정 Hahm Eun Jeong，英語：Hahm Eun Jung、Elsie Hahm，1988 年 12 月 12 日－），藝名晶（朝鮮語：은정 Eun Jeong，英語：Eunjung）和 Elsie（Solo 時使用，朝鮮語：엘시 El Si），前錯譯作含恩靜、鹹恩靜、鹹慇晶，韓國女藝人、饒舌者和主持人，女子流行音樂組合 T - ara 成員，為隊中的第一任隊長。

晶在七年級時開始學習跆拳道，並在三個不同比賽中獲勝。2007 年晶高中畢業之前，她的媽媽決定辭去晶所屬的經紀公司鋼琴教學工作，專職管理晶的演藝事業。

晶最初為兒童演員，早在 1995 年參演 KBS 劇集《看新時代不知道大人》，之後一直有參演電視劇和電影。她在某電影拍攝過程中通過導演介紹與 Core Contents Media 代表金光洙見面，並加入 Mnet Media 當練習生，在 T - ara 出道前三年已加入公司接受訓練，因此她是 T - ara 中資歷最深的成員，故在 2009 年 7 月 29 日 T - ara 正式出道時被選為隊長。
data.name: 鹹恩靜

data.overview:
Lúc nhỏ, Vi Đức Tín (do Hà Quảng Bái đóng) bị sốc nặng do cái chết của cha. Từ đó, Tín thay đổi tính cách, mất hết ký ức về cha. Mẹ của Tín là Tạ Mỹ Thường (do Lâm Y Kỳ đóng) và cậu Tạ Thiêm Thắng (do Tào Vĩnh Liêm đóng) vì bảo vệ Tín mà không nhắc đến cái chết của cha anh.

Trong một dịp tình cờ, Đức Tín đã quen biết với con gái chủ tiệm đồ cũ là Phùng Tổ Nghi (do Trần Hiểu Hoa đóng). Tổ Nghi đã có bạn trai là bác sĩ Lý Chí Hằng (do Ngô Nghiệp Khôn đóng). Tín phát hiện mình có cảm ứng đặc biệt với đồ vật cũ. Chính vì vậy, Tín và Nghi đã giúp nhiều người gỡ nút thắt trong lòng.

data.biography:
Donald Lake (born November 26, 1956) is a Canadian actor, writer, and television producer. He is frequently cast by director Christopher Guest, and is also a close friend and frequent collaborator of Bonnie Hunt.

He had a role in The Bonnie Hunt Show, for which he received comedic praise. He also had roles in the comedy films Police Academy, Hot Shots!, Dumb & Dumber To, and Corner Gas: The Movie. He played more serious roles in Terminator 2: Judgment Day and Super Mario Bros., along with a voice role as Stu Hopps in Zootopia. He is also known as Dr. Carl Whitehorn on The Fresh Prince of Bel-Air.

After graduating from the California Institute of the Arts, he returned to Toronto to join the Second City Touring Company, and later was promoted to The Second City. He also appeared in the Netflix comedy series Space Force.
data.name: Don Lake

data.biography: Oh Jung-se (born February 26, 1977) is a South Korean actor. Oh began his career in theater, and has since appeared in many onscreen supporting roles over the years, notably in Petty Romance (2010), Couples (2011), As One (2012), A Millionaire On the Run (2012), and Running Man (2013). But his performance in the 2013 romantic comedy How to Use Guys with Secret Tips earned him special attention from critics and viewers. This led to Oh being cast in his first leading role in the 2013 film The Hero.

data.biography: Chelsey Marie Reist (* 4. Januar 1987 in Edmonton) ist eine kanadische Schauspielerin. Von 2014 bis 2018 verkörperte sie die Rolle der Harper McIntyre in der Serie The 100.

Челси Мари Рейст - канадская актриса, телеведущая и танцовщица. В 2014-2018 годах она играла Харпер Макинтайр в сериале The CW "100". Рост — 1,65 м. Родилась 4 января 1987 года в Эдмонтоне (Альберта, Канада). Выросла в этом городе, но позже переехала в Ванкувер для карьеры. Получила диплом по актёрскому мастерству для сцены и экрана в университете Капилано в Северном Ванкувере. Также училась танцевать, включая выступления в Disneyland. В 2012 году она снялась в роли Рэйчел в фильме ужасов "Мотель без разговоров", который был показан на Каннском кинофестивале, а также в фильме "12 раундов: перезагрузка" с рестлером WWE Рэнди Ортоном в главной роли.
data.name: Челси Рейст

In the 1960s, Padilla was a popular child actor, usually playing the Mexican or Indian boy in TV westerns such as "Rawhide," "Bonanza" and "Gunsmoke". He was a regular in the 1960s TV series "Tarzan", with actor Ron Ely, in dozens of episodes as native boy 'Jai', and as also a semi-regular in the TV series, "The Flying Nun", with actress Sally Field. In featured films, as an adult, Padilla made appearances in the films, "The Great White Hope", "American Graffiti", "A Man Called Horse", and "Scarface", among others.

Padilla died unexpectedly at age 52, just after making a public appearance at the Grand National Roadster Show in Pomona, California, in January 2008.

data.biography:
Im Ye-jin (born Im Ki-hee) is a South Korean actress. As a teenage actress, she reached the peak of her popularity in the 1970s with the "Really Really" film trilogy, which include Never Forget Me, I Am Really Sorry and I Really Really Like You. She is currently active in television.

As Im grew older, she remained active on television and the occasional film, in supporting roles as ajummas, aunts or mothers. As if coming full circle, she played one of the adult characters in a 2010 musical theatre adaptation of her early hit I Really Really Like You.

Agency: YG entertainment (2014).

Married to Choi Chang Wook(1989), TV director and producer at MBC.
data.name: Im Ye-jin

data.biography:
林艺珍（原名林基熙）是韩国女演员。作为一名十几岁的女演员，她在 1970 年代凭借“Really Really”电影三部曲达到了人气的顶峰，其中包括《永不忘记我》、《我真的很抱歉》和《我真的很喜欢你》。她目前活跃在电视上。

随着年龄的增长，她仍然活跃在电视和偶尔的电影中，扮演 ajummas、阿姨或母亲的配角。仿佛兜了一圈，她在 2010 年改编自她早期热门歌曲《我真的很喜欢你》的音乐剧中扮演了一个成人角色。

经纪公司：YG娱乐（2014年）。

与MBC电视导演兼制片人崔昌旭（1989）结婚。
data.name: 林艺珍

data.biography:
Im Ye-jin (nascida Im Ki-hee) é uma atriz sul-coreana. Como atriz adolescente, ela atingiu o auge de sua popularidade na década de 1970 com a trilogia de filmes 'Really Really', que inclui Never Forget Me, I Am Really Sorry e I Really Really Like You. Ela está atualmente ativa na televisão.

À medida que Im crescia, ela permaneceu ativa na televisão e em filmes ocasionais, em papéis coadjuvantes como ajummas, tias ou mães. Como se fechasse o círculo, ela interpretou um dos personagens adultos em uma adaptação para o teatro musical de 2010 de seu primeiro sucesso I Really Really Like You.

Agência: YG Entertainment (2014).

Casado com Choi Chang Wook (1989), diretor de TV e produtor da MBC.

林藝珍（原名林基熙）是韓國女演員。作為一名十幾歲的女演員，她在 1970 年代憑藉“Really Really”電影三部曲達到了人氣的頂峯，其中包括《永不忘記我》、《我真的很抱歉》和《我真的很喜歡你》。她目前活躍在電視上。

隨著年齡的增長，她仍然活躍在電視和偶爾的電影中，扮演 ajummas、阿姨或母親的配角。彷彿兜了一圈，她在 2010 年改編自她早期熱門歌曲《我真的很喜歡你》的音樂劇中扮演了一個成人角色。

經紀公司：YG 娛樂（2014 年）。

與 MBC 電視導演兼製片人崔昌旭（1989）結婚。
data.name: 林藝珍

data.biography: Настоящее имя - Юрий Георгиевич Куценко. Отец, Георгий Павлович, работал руководителем в радиопромышленности; мама, Светлана Васильевна, была врачом. После школы поступил в Львовский политехнический институт, но не доучился. Отслужил два года в армии. В 1988 году семья переехала в Москву (Георгия Павловича назначили заместителем министра радиопромышленности СССР). Учился в Московском институте радиотехники, электроники и автоматики, но после двух курсов решил поступать в театральный. В 1992 году окончил Школу-студию МХАТ (мастерская И.М.Тарханова). В 1995-1997 годах работал на телевидении, был ведущим передачи "Партийная зона" на канале ТВ-6, а также ведущим МУЗ-ТВ. В 1996-2000 годах преподавал во ВГИКе на курсе Е.Киндинова. С 2008 года — актер Театра имени Моссовета.
data.name: Гоша Куценко

data.biography: Yuriy Georgiyevich Kutsenko (Russian: Ю́рий Гео́ргиевич Куце́нко; born 20 May 1967; Zaporozhye), better known as Gosha Kutsenko (Russian: Гоша Куценко), is a Russian actor, producer, singer, poet, and screenwriter. Kutsenko has appeared in high-profile films such as Mama Don't Cry, Antikiller, Night Watch, Lubov-Morkov, and Echelon Conspiracy.
data.name: Gosha Kutsenko

data.biography:
Juri Georgijewitsch Kuzenko (russisch Юрий Георгиевич Куценко, besser bekannt unter seinem Künstlernamen Goscha Kuzenko/ Гоша Куценко) ist ein russischer Schauspieler.

Kuzenko ist aus vielen russischen Spielfilmen bekannt, wobei seine Bekanntheit großteils aus den Filmen Mama, weine nicht (Мама, не горюй) und Antikiller (Антикиллер) resultierte.

Nach dem Militärdienst in der Sowjetarmee zog er 1988 nach Moskau um. Er besuchte das Moskauer Institut für Radiotechnik, Elektronik und Automatik und wechselte innerhalb von zwei Jahren ans Schulstudio МХАТ.

Colm Joseph Feore OC (/ˈkɒləm ˈfjɔːr/; born August 22, 1958) is a Canadian actor. A 15-year veteran of the Stratford Festival, he is known for his Gemini-winning turn as Prime Minister Pierre Trudeau in the CBC miniseries Trudeau (2002), his portrayal of Glenn Gould in Thirty Two Short Films About Glenn Gould (1993), and for playing Detective Martin Ward in Bon Cop, Bad Cop (2006) and its sequel Bon Cop, Bad Cop 2 (2017).

His other roles include Martin Harrison in Chicago (2002), Lord Marshal Zhylaw in The Chronicles of Riddick (2004), First Gentleman Henry Taylor on 24 (2009), Cardinal Della Rovere on The Borgias (2011–2013), Laufey in Thor (2011), General Ted Brockhart on House of Cards (2016–2017), Declan Gallard on 21 Thunder (2017), Wernher von Braun in For All Mankind (2019), and Sir Reginald Hargreeves on The Umbrella Academy (2019–present). Feore is also a Prix Iris and Screen Actors Guild Award winner and a Genie Award nominee.
data.name: Colm Feore

data.biography:
Colm Feore (* 22. August 1958 in Boston, Massachusetts) ist ein US-amerikanisch-kanadischer Schauspieler.

In Kanada war seine bekannteste Rolle der Premierminister Pierre Trudeau in der von der Kritik gefeierten Fernseh-Miniserie Trudeau aus dem Jahr 2002.

Außerhalb von Kanada war Feore in zahlreichen Fernseh- aber auch in einigen Kinofilmen zu sehen. Seinen ersten Auftritt vor einer Kamera hatte er 1986 in dem Fernsehfilm The Boys from Syracuse. Nach drei weiteren TV-Produktionen folgte 1988 der erste Kinofilm Der stählerne Adler II.

Sein klassischer Theaterhintergrund verleiht seinen Filmfiguren Tiefe. Ein weiterer Bonus ist Feores Erfahrung mit Schwertkämpfen. So zeigte er sein Können 1995 in einer Folge der Fernsehserie Nick Knight – Der Vampircop, in der er und sein guter Freund und Stratford-Kollege Geraint Wyn Davies sich ihre Fähigkeiten im Umgang mit Schwertern zu Nutze machten und eine hervorragende Schwertkampfszene nur zum Spaß hinzufügten. Auch in Riddick: Chroniken eines Kriegers setzte er diese Fertigkeit ein.

Im Filmdrama Die rote Violine (The Red Violin) (1998), das für die Originalmusik von John Corigliano mit dem Oscar ausgezeichnet wurde, spielte er den Leiter einer Versteigerung in einem Auktionshaus. 1999 gewann Feore den kanadischen Prix Jutra als bester Nebendarsteller für Die rote Violine. 2000 folgte eine Nominierung beim Saturn Award als Bester Nebendarsteller für Der Sturm des Jahrhunderts. 2001 wurde er als bester Hauptdarsteller für The Perfect Son für einen Genie Award nominiert.

Nach Nominierungen in den Jahren 1989 und 2001 erhielt er 2002 einen Gemini Award als bester Hauptdarsteller und zwar für die Miniserie Trudeau. 2003 gewann er zusammen mit der restlichen Besetzung bei den Screen Actors Guild Awards für Chicago den Award als bestes Schauspielensemble. 2007 wurde er bei den 27. Genie Awards für Good Cop Bad Cop als bester Hauptdarsteller nominiert. In dieser Actionkomödie von Regisseur Eric Canuel spielte er einen kanadischen Polizisten, der trotz Meinungsverschiedenheiten mit seinem Kollegen, dargestellt von Patrick Huard, zusammenarbeiten muss, um eine Mordserie aufzuklären.

Von 2011 bis 2013 verkörperte er Kardinal Giuliano della Rovere in der Fernsehserie The Borgias über Rodrigo Borgia und dessen Familie.

科鲁姆·约瑟夫·费奥瑞（/ˈkɒləm ˈfjɔːr/;1958年8月22日-），加拿大演员。作为斯特拉特福电影节的 15 年老将，他因在 CBC 迷你剧《特鲁多》（2002 年）中饰演总理皮埃尔·特鲁多 （Pierre Trudeau） 而获得双子座奖，在《关于格伦·古尔德的三十二部短片》（1993 年）中饰演格伦·古尔德，以及在《Bon Cop， Bad Cop》（2006 年）及其续集《Bon Cop》中扮演侦探马丁·沃德 （Martin Ward） 而闻名。 坏警察 2 （2017）。

他的其他角色包括《芝加哥》（2002 年）中的马丁·哈里森、《里迪克编年史》（2004 年）中的日劳元帅、《24 日》（2009 年）中的第一位绅士亨利·泰勒、《博吉亚家族》（2011-2013 年）中的红衣主教德拉·罗韦尔、《雷神》（2011 年）中的劳菲、《纸牌屋》（2016-2017 年）中的泰德·布罗克哈特将军、《雷霆 21 日》（2017 年）中的德克兰·加拉德、《为了全人类》（2019 年）中的沃纳·冯·布劳恩、 雷金纳德·哈格里夫斯爵士（Sir Reginald Hargreeves）在《雨伞学院》（The Umbrella Academy）（2019年至今）。Feore 还是 Prix Iris 和 Screen Actors Guild 奖得主以及精灵奖提名人。
data.name: 科鲁姆·费奥瑞

data.biography:
科魯姆·約瑟夫·費奧瑞（/ˈkɒləm ˈfjɔːr/; 1958 年 8 月 22 日-），加拿大演員。作為斯特拉特福電影節的 15 年老將，他因在 CBC 迷你劇《特魯多》（2002 年）中飾演總理皮埃爾·特魯多 （Pierre Trudeau） 而獲得雙子座獎，在《關於格倫·古爾德的三十二部短片》（1993 年）中飾演格倫·古爾德，以及在《Bon Cop， Bad Cop》（2006 年）及其續集《Bon Cop》中扮演偵探馬丁·沃德 （Martin Ward） 而聞名。

壞警察 2 （2017）。

他的其他角色包括《芝加哥》（2002 年）中的馬丁·哈里森、《裏迪克編年史》（2004 年）中的日勞元帥、《24 日》（2009 年）中的第一位紳士亨利·泰勒、《博吉亞家族》（2011 - 2013 年）中的紅衣主教德拉·羅韋爾、《雷神奇俠》（2011 年）中的勞菲、《紙牌屋》（2016 - 2017 年）中的泰德·布羅克哈特將軍、《雷霆 21 日》（2017 年）中的德克蘭·加拉德、《為了全人類》（2019 年）中的沃納·馮·布勞恩、 雷金納德·哈格裏夫斯爵士（Sir Reginald Hargreeves）在《雨傘學院》（The Umbrella Academy）（2019 年至今）。Feore 還是 Prix Iris 和 Screen Actors Guild 獎得主以及精靈獎提名人。
data.name: 科魯姆·費奧瑞

data.biography: Alanna Ubach (born October 3, 1975) is an American actress and voice actress. She is known for her film roles as Serena in the Legally Blonde films, Angela in Bad Teacher, Isabel Villalobos in Meet the Fockers, and Naomi in Waiting... and Still Waiting .... She's known for her TV roles as Tessa on Guilty Party, Suze Howard on Euphoria, Jo on Girlfriends' Guide to Divorce, and Amy Hobbs on the sitcom See Dad Run. She played the first female assistant, Josie, on Beakman's World.  She has provided voices for several characters in a number of animated shows, such as Miss Fussywiggles on Princess Power, Carla / Rosie on Monsters at Work, Queen Tulip on Crossing Swords, Ansi Molina on Welcome to the Wayne, Liz Allan on The Spectacular Spider-Man, and Lola Boa on Brandy & Mr. Whiskers. She has also written and performed a one-woman show.
data.name: Alanna Ubach

data.biography:
阿兰娜·乌巴赫（1975年10月3日出生）是一位美国女演员。她因在《律政俏佳人》（2001）和《律政俏佳人2》（2003）中饰演塞丽娜·麦圭尔，在《认识福克斯一家》（2004）中饰演伊莎贝尔·维拉洛博斯，在《修女行动2：重返修女服》（1993）中饰演玛丽亚，在《布雷迪一家电影》（1995）中饰演诺琳，在《钟表观察者》（1997）中饰演简，在《等待......》（2005）中饰演娜奥米......，以及《仍在等待......》中的角色而闻名。 （2009年）、《Being Us》（2011年）中的玛格丽特、2019年《炸弹女郎》中的珍妮娜·皮罗，以及《可可梦》（2017年）中妈妈伊梅尔达的配音，以及乔·埃尔南德斯-弗朗普基斯在《女友离婚指南》中的配音，苏兹·霍华德在《亢奋》中的声音，艾米·霍布斯在《看爸爸跑》中的声音，特莎·弗洛雷斯在《罪恶派对》中的配音，卡罗尔·阿特金森在空乘，苏珊·贝内特谈《泰德》。

她为多部动画电视剧和电影中的多个角色配音，如《惊奇蜘蛛侠》中的莉兹·艾伦、《老虎：曼尼·里维拉历险记》中的主角、《布兰迪与胡须先生》中的萝拉·波阿、《狗狗一流》中的斯特鲁德尔、《欢迎来到韦恩》中的安西·莫利纳、《滑板小子》和《绳索女孩》中的配音《至尊队》以及奥斯卡获奖动画电影《兰戈》（2011）中的四个角色。她在电视节目《比克曼的世界》中饰演首位女性助理兼联合主持人乔西，并因此获得了1992年青年艺术家奖提名。
data.name: 阿兰娜·乌巴赫

（2009 年）、《Being Us》（2011 年）中的瑪格麗特、2019 年《炸彈女郎》中的珍妮娜·皮羅，以及《可可夢》（2017 年）中媽媽伊梅爾達的配音，以及喬·埃爾南德斯 - 弗朗普基斯在《女友離婚指南》中的配音，蘇茲·霍華德在《亢奮》中的聲音，艾米·霍布斯在《看爸爸跑》中的聲音，特莎·弗洛雷斯在《罪惡派對》中的配音，卡羅爾·阿特金森在空乘，蘇珊·貝內特談《泰德》。

data.biography:
Edgerly was born in Silver Spring, Maryland and moved at the age of 2 with his mom and two brothers to Savannah, Georgia.

He attended Benedictine Military High School and the University of Georgia later on, where he would entertain his friends with lots of impressions. After a season of rugby at the university, he tried his hand at stand-up comedy at the urging of his roommates. A 10-year career touring the country followed (where his ability to do voices came in handy), punctuated by the occasional TV appearance on Nickelodeon. He relocated to Orlando in his early 20s and then later, he relocated to Los Angeles. Edgerly has since settled into the world of voiceover, in which he provides voices for movies, TV shows, and video games, and he still does the occasional stand-up gig around town.
data.name: Chris Edgerly

data.biography:
Edgerly nació en Silver Spring, Maryland y se mudó a la edad de 2 años con su madre y dos hermanos a Savannah, Georgia.

Asistió a la escuela secundaria militar benedictina y más tarde a la Universidad de Georgia, donde entretenía a sus amigos con muchas impresiones. Después de una temporada de rugby en la universidad, probó suerte en la comedia stand-up a instancias de sus compañeros de cuarto. Siguió una carrera de 10 años recorriendo el país (donde su habilidad para hacer voces fue útil), marcada por la aparición ocasional en televisión en Nickelodeon. Se mudó a Orlando cuando tenía poco más de 20 años y luego se mudó a Los Ángeles. Desde entonces, Edgerly se ha asentado en el mundo de la voz en off, en el que brinda voces para películas, programas de televisión y videojuegos, y todavía hace presentaciones ocasionales en la ciudad.

data.name: クリス・エドガーリー

data.biography: Sebastian Rudolph is a German actor, born October 21, 1968, in Berlin. Son of actress Hildegard Schmahl and director Niels-Peter Rudolph, he trained in acting in Hamburg. Known for portraying Michael Kahnwald in Netflix’s Dark (2017–2020), he has also appeared in films like The English Patient (1996), Never Look Away (2018), Stalingrad (1993), and various German theater, TV, and radio productions. He was a long-time ensemble member at the Thalia Theatre in Hamburg.
data.name: Sebastian Rudolph

data.biography:
Он сын актрисы Хильдегард Шмаль, режиссера Нильса-Питера Рудольфа . Он живет и работает в Гамбурге.

После окончания актерского обучения в Гамбурге в 1989 году он получил первые роли в начале 1990-х годов в комедии Манта и в военной драме Сталинград . С тех пор он снялся более чем 35 фильмах. Рудольф регулярно появлялся в таких сериалах, как Tatort , Doppelte Einsatz , Wolffs Revier , Der Alte и Schloßhotel Orth . Он сыграл Рудольфа Аугштейна в фильме Die Spiegel , ARD, который был показан весной 2014 года.

Себастьян играл в Базельском театре , Берлинский ансамбль , Шаубюне в Берлине , Volksbühne Berlin , Schauspielhaus Hamburg , Schauspielhaus Zürich , Kampnagel в Гамбурге и Бургтеатр в Вене. Он работал с такими режиссерами, как Люк Бонди , Шорш Камерун , Кристоф Марталер , Стефан Пучер , Фальк Рихтер , Кристоф Шлингенсиф и Роберт Уилсон., Себастьян Рудольф является постоянным участником театра Талия в Гамбурге с сезона 2009/2010 . Его роли включают Фауста I + II, режиссера Николаса Стемана , который был приглашен на Берлинскую театральную встречу 2012 года и был выбран для постановки 2012 года. С сезона 2019/2020 Себастьян Рудольф был членом ансамбля в Schauspielhaus Zurich.  За то, что он сыграл роль Фауста I + II, Рудольф был признан Актером года 2012 по результатам ежегодного опроса критиков журнала « Театр сегодня» .

Audrie J. Neenan (born October 28, 1950) is an American stage and screen actress. Many of her roles have been portrayals of intimidating female figures such as judges, policewomen and mouthy waitresses. Notable film appearances include Sudden Impact (1983), Funny Farm (1988), See No Evil, Hear No Evil (1989), The Departed (2006), and Doubt (2008).

Neenan made her Broadway debut opposite Faye Dunaway in William Alfred's Curse of an Aching Heart, directed by Gerald Gutierrez. She went on to appear in productions of The Odd Couple (as Florence Ungar), Oklahoma! (as Aunt Eller), and Sister Act (as Sister Mary Lazarus). She is a frequent television guest star, appearing in shows such as Friends (1994), Ally McBeal (1997), and Gossip Girl (2008). She has appeared in several episodes of Law & Order: SVU as Judge Lois Preston.
data.name: Audrie Neenan

data.biography:
Victoria Wood CBE (19 May 1953 – 20 April 2016) was an English comedian, actress, singer and songwriter, screenwriter and director. Wood wrote and starred in sketches, plays, films and sitcoms, and her live comedy act was interspersed with her own compositions, which she accompanied on piano. Wood also composed and performed the theme music for her award winning BBC sitcom Dinnerladies. Much of her humour was grounded in everyday life, and included references to popular British media and brand names of quintessentially British products. She was noted for her skills in observing culture, and in satirising social classes.

She started her career in 1974 by winning the ATV talent show New Faces. It wasn't until the 1980s that she began to establish herself as a comedy star, with the award-winning television series Victoria Wood As Seen on TV and became one of Britain's most popular stand-up comics. In 1998, she wrote and starred in the (again, award-winning) sitcom Dinnerladies. In 2006, she won two BAFTA awards for her one-off drama for ITV1, Housewife, 49. Wood frequently worked with long-term collaborators Julie Walters, Duncan Preston and Celia Imrie. Victoria Wood died on 20 April 2016 after a short battle with cancer. She was 62.
data.name: Victoria Wood

data.biography: Jovan Adepo (born September 6, 1988) is a British-born American actor. He is known for his role as Cory Maxson in the film adaptation of Fences (2016), and also had starring roles in the 2018 film Overlord and as Lionel Jefferson in CBS' All in the Family/The Jeffersons special. Adepo was featured in the series When They See Us, the second season of Prime Video’s Jack Ryan, and the Facebook series Sorry for Your Loss. He plays Michael Murphy in the HBO series The Leftovers and in 2019 appeared in Watchmen as Hooded Justice. For the latter, he was nominated for the Primetime Emmy Award for Outstanding Supporting Actor in a Limited Series or Movie. He also starred as Larry Underwood in the Paramount+ miniseries of Stephen King's The Stand.
data.name: Jovan Adepo

data.biography:
约翰·艾德坡（英语：Jovan Adepo，1988年9月6日—），英国裔美国男演员，知名演出作品如电影《藩篱》、《霸主》，以及电视剧《节哀顺变》、《杰克·莱恩》和《末日逼近》。2019年出演电视剧《守护者》中的蒙面侠客，为此提名黄金时段艾美奖最佳迷你剧或电视电影最佳男配角。

约翰·艾德坡生于牛津郡上海福德。母亲是来自伦敦的英国尼日利亚人，父亲是来自田纳西州查塔努加的非裔美国人。外祖父法泰·艾德坡（Fatai Adepo）是尼日利亚前总统奥卢塞贡·奥巴桑乔的特别顾问。他在2岁时随家人移居美国。他于马里兰州华尔道夫长大，曾在学校和教堂演出。

艾德坡就读于马里兰州布伊州立大学，获得政治学和哲学学士学位。在学习政治学时，他开始学习创意写作课程。后来他决定搬到洛杉矶成为一名作家，并在广告工作室工作以增加收入。他为了预订广告、赚取额外收入而参加了表演课程，此后他对表演的兴趣与日俱增，并在许多著名导师的指导下学习表演。
data.name: 约翰·艾德坡

約翰·艾德波（英語：賈方·艾德波，1988 年 9 月 6 日—），英國裔美國男演員，知名演出作品如電影《藩籬》、《霸主》，以及電視劇《節哀順變》、《傑克·萊恩》和《末日逼近》。2019 年出演電視劇《保衞奇俠》中的蒙面俠客，為此提名黃金時段艾美獎最佳迷你劇或電視電影最佳男配角。

約翰·艾德波生於牛津郡上海福德。母親是來自倫敦的英國奈及利亞人，父親是來自田納西州查塔努加的非裔美國人。外祖父法泰·艾德波（Fatai Adepo）是奈及利亞前總統奧盧塞貢·奧巴桑喬的特別顧問。他在 2 歲時隨家人移居美國。他於馬裏蘭州華爾道夫長大，曾在學校和教堂演出。

艾德波就讀於馬裏蘭州布伊州立大學，獲得政治學和哲學學士學位。在學習政治學時，他開始學習創意寫作課程。後來他決定搬到洛杉磯成為一名作家，並在廣告工作室工作以增加收入。他為了預訂廣告、賺取額外收入而參加了表演課程，此後他對錶演的興趣與日俱增，並在許多著名導師的指導下學習表演。
data.name: 賈方·艾德波

data.biography:
Jovan Adepo, 6 Eylül 1988 tarihinde Oxfordshire, İngiltere'de dünyaya gelmiştir. İngiliz-Nijeryalı bir anne ve Afro-Amerikan bir babanın çocuğu olarak çifte vatandaşlığa sahiptir. Oyunculuk, Adepo için ilk kariyer tercihi değildi; Maryland'deki Bowie State Üniversitesi'nde Siyaset Bilimi ve Felsefe okudu. Mezun olduktan sonra yazar olmak amacıyla Los Angeles'a taşındı. Karakter gelişimini daha iyi anlamak için aldığı oyunculuk dersleri sırasında yeteneğinin keşfedilmesi ve hocalarının teşvikiyle profesyonel olarak bu alana yöneldi.

Kısa sürede yeteneği fark edildi ve ilk büyük çıkışını HBO'nun beğenilen dizisi "The Leftovers"da (2015-2017) canlandırdığı Michael Murphy karakteriyle yaptı. Bu dizinin ikinci sezonuna katılmasına rağmen performansıyla büyük beğeni topladı. Sinemadaki atılımı ise çok daha görkemli oldu. 2016 yılında, Denzel Washington'ın yönettiği ve başrolünü Viola Davis ile paylaştığı "Fences" filminde onların oğlunu canlandırdı. Eleştirmenlerden tam not alan ve Oscar'a aday gösterilen bu filmdeki rolü, Adepo'yu sinema dünyasının en umut vadeden genç yeteneklerinden biri olarak konumlandırdı. Ardından J.J. Abrams'ın yapımcılığını üstlendiği II. Dünya Savaşı temalı korku filmi "Overlord" (2018) ile başrol oyuncusu olarak yeteneğini sergiledi.

Ancak Adepo'nun kariyerindeki en büyük eleştirel başarılarından biri, HBO'nun çığır açan dizisi "Watchmen"deki (2019) performansıyla geldi. Dizide canlandırdığı Hooded Justice karakteri, ona Sınırlı Dizilerde En İyi Yardımcı Erkek Oyuncu dalında Primetime Emmy Ödülü adaylığı getirdi. Bu başarıyı, Ava DuVernay'in yönettiği "When They See Us" (2019) ve Stephen King uyarlaması "The Stand" (2020) gibi prestijli projeler takip etti. Damien Chazelle'in yönettiği "Babil" (Babylon) (2022) filminde ise caz trompetçisi Sidney Palmer karakterine hayat verdi.

Yakın dönemde Adepo, başrol oyuncusu olarak kariyerinde yeni bir sayfa açtı. Netflix'in dünya çapında ses getiren bilimkurgu dizisi "3 Cisim Problemi"nde (3 Body Problem) (2024) canlandırdığı bilim insanı Saul Durand rolüyle başrol kadrosunda yer aldı. Jovan Adepo, kısa sürede Hollywood'un en saygın ve aranan aktörlerinden biri haline gelmiş, genellikle karmaşık ve düşündürücü projelerdeki derinlikli performanslarıyla tanınan bir isimdir.

data.biography: Thure Lindhardt is a Danish actor, educated at the drama school at Odense Theater in 1998. Lindhardt was born in Copenhagen and grew up in Roskilde. At the age of 12, he got a part in Bille August's film Pelle the Conqueror. His breakthrough in Denmark came with his portrayal of a boy with autism in A Place Nearby, starring alongside Ghita Nørby. Since then, he has played parts in a variety of movies and series, including Into the Wild, Love in Thoughts, Sugar Rush, Princess, Rejseholdet, and Flame & Citron, a movie about the World War II resistance group Holger Danske, starring alongside Mads Mikkelsen. Most recently, he played a leading role as the young Swiss Guard Lieutenant Chartrand in the 2009 film Angels & Demons, directed by Ron Howard.
data.name: Thure Lindhardt

data.biography:
Thure Frank Lindhardt (født 24. december 1974 i Roskilde) er en dansk skuespiller og er uddannet fra Skuespillerskolen ved Odense Teater i 1998. Han fik sit helt store gennembrud i rollen som den autistiske Brian i Kaspar Rostrups drama Her i nærheden (2000). Siden har han haft betydelige roller i successer som bl.a. Nordkraft (2005), Flammen & Citronen (2008), Blå mænd (2008) og Sandheden om mænd (2010).

Internationalt er han kendt for roller i bl.a. Dan Brown-filmatiseringen Engle og Dæmoner (2009) og som kidnapperen Wolfgang Přiklopil i Natascha Kampusch-filmen 3096 Tage (2012). Lindhardt er blevet hædret med adskillige priser i årenes løb, bl.a. Reumerts Talentpris, Hartmann-Fondens Diplompris og Teaterpokalen.

Thure Frank Lindhardt, skuespiller, er søn af rektor Mogens Lindhardt (16-12-1946) og hustru adm. overlæge Anne Lindhardt, f. Frank og er barnebarn af teologen P.G. Lindhardt (1910-1988). Han tilbragte 2 g i Tyskland på en kostskole med mange teaterprojekter og i 1994 blev han optaget på Skuespillerskolen ved Odense Teater. Efter sin færdiguddannelse i 1998 har han været en af de mest benyttede unge skuespillere både på tv, film og teater. Han debuterede i 1998 som unge Gary i "Shopping and Fucking" på Café-Teatret og spillede året efter i "Natsværmer" på Mammutteatret. På det Kongelige Teater har han bl.a. spillet i "Ci-vi-li-sa-tion", "Sælsomt mellemspil" og "Antonius og Cleopatra". Han havde titelrollen i Gladsaxe Teaters "Aladdin" i Ulvedalene i 2000 og var Armand i "Kameliadamen" i 2002. I 2003 medvirkede han i "Norway-today" på Husets Teater og året efter i "Plasticin" på Mammutteatret. I 2004 medvirkede han også i "Hamlet" på Kronborg og senere i 2007 i samme forestilling på Gladsaxe Ny Teater. Allerede i 1987 havde han en rolle i filmen "Pelle Erobreren" og i børnefilmen "Negerkys og labre larver". Men han fik sit helt store gennembrud på film som den autistiske Brian i Kaspar Rostrups "Her i nærheden". Siden har Thure Lindhardt haft stor succes som filmskuespiller i film som "Blå mænd", "Flammen og Citronen" og "Julefrokosten" og i tv-serierne "Strisser på Samsø", "Rejseholdet", "Ved Stillebækken" og som trækkerdrengen Billy i "Edderkoppen". Han spillede Bo Weimann i TV2's krimiserie "Blekingegade". Thure Lindhardt har desuden medvirket i amerikanske produktioner, bl.a. som Mads i "Into the Wild" (2007) og som den unge løjtnant Chartrand i Dan Brown-filmatiseringen "Engle og dæmoner" (2009). Desuden havde han roller i tv-serierne "The Spiral" (2012) og "The Borgias" (2013) og medvirkede i en række tyske krimiserier som "Tatort", "Ein starkes Team", "Schuld" og "Hindenburg". Thure Lindhardt modtog Reumerts Talentpris i 1999 og var Shooting Star på Berlin Filmfestivalen i 2000. Han fik Robert-pris for bedste mandlige birolle i filmen "Nordkraft" i 2006, Teaterpokalen i 2013 og Lauritzen-prisen i 2014. Han var i en årrække kæreste med scenografen Simon Holk Witzansky og dannede i to år frem til 2010 par med danseren Silas Holst. I 2017 fik Thure Lindhardt en datter med to veninder, og sammen dannede de en regnbuefamilie. Thure Lindhardt er nu samlevende med den 13 år yngre Lasse Flintholm, der er selvstændig yoga instruktør.
data.name: Thure Lindhardt

data.biography: 图尔·林德哈特（Thure Lindhardt）是丹麦演员，1998年在欧登塞剧院戏剧学校接受教育。林德哈特出生于哥本哈根，在罗斯基勒长大。12岁时，他出演了比尔·奥古斯特（Bille August）的电影《征服者佩尔》（Pelle the Conqueror）。他在丹麦的突破来自于他在《附近的地方》中饰演一个患有自闭症的男孩，与吉塔·诺比（Ghita Nørby）一起主演。从那时起，他在各种电影和连续剧中扮演角色，包括《荒野》、《思想中的爱》、《糖冲》、《公主》、《Rejseholdet》和《火焰与香橼》，这是一部关于二战抵抗组织霍尔格·丹斯克的电影，与麦德斯·米科尔森一起主演。最近，他在2009年由朗·霍华德（Ron Howard）执导的电影《天使与恶魔》（Angels & Demons）中饰演年轻的瑞士卫队中尉夏特朗（Chartrand）。
data.name: 图尔·林德哈特

data.biography: 圖爾·林德哈特（Thure Lindhardt）是丹麥演員，1998 年在歐登塞劇院戲劇學校接受教育。林德哈特出生於哥本哈根，在羅斯基勒長大。12 歲時，他出演了比爾·奧古斯特（Bille August）的電影《徵服者佩爾》（Pelle the Conqueror）。他在丹麥的突破來自於他在《附近的地方》中飾演一個患有自閉症的男孩，與吉塔·諾比（Ghita Nørby）一起主演。從那時起，他在各種電影和聯續劇中扮演角色，包括《烏有之地》、《思想中的愛》、《糖衝》、《公主》、《Rejseholdet》和《火焰與香櫞》，這是一部關於二戰抵抗組織霍爾格·丹斯克的電影，與麥德斯·米科爾森一起主演。最近，他在 2009 年由朗·霍華德（Ron Howard）執導的電影《天使與惡魔》（Angels & Demons）中飾演年輕的瑞士衞隊中尉夏特朗（Chartrand）。
data.name: 圖爾·林德哈特

data.biography:
梁小龙，1948年4月28日出生于中国广东省中山市，籍贯中国山东省烟台市，中国香港男演员、武术家、武术指导、武打明星。

成长于香港一个贫寒的家庭，15岁时进入武行，并开始做替身演员。20世纪70年代就在香港演艺圈和李小龙、成龙、狄龙并称为香港演艺圈“四小龙”。

2007年，获得中国功夫全球盛典“最佳动作男演员”奖。2010年，在加拿大Fantasia国际电影节大会获得“传奇功夫巨星”奖。曾出演《大侠霍元甲》《陈真》红遍大江南北。2014年，梁小龙主演了电影《剑河》，这是一部内地版的《赛德克·巴莱》。

代表作品：《大侠霍元甲》《陈真》等。
data.name: 梁小龙

data.biography: Bruce Leung Siu-Lung (born 28 April 1948) is a Hong Kong martial artist and actor who has appeared in many Hong Kong martial arts movies. He often appeared billed as "Bruce Leung", "Bruce Liang", "Bruce Leong", or "Bruce Leung Siu-lung", and is thus generally grouped among the Bruce Lee clones that sprang up after Lee's death in the subgenre known as Bruceploitation.
data.name: Bruce Leung Siu-Lung

data.biography: Lương Tài Sinh, thường được biết đến với nghệ danh Lương Tiểu Long, là một nam diễn viên kiêm võ sư người Hồng Kông. Ông được khán giả biết đến qua các vai diễn nổi bật trong dòng phim võ thuật, trong đó có Tuyệt đỉnh Kungfu, Thái cực quyền và Nhất đại tông sư

data.biography:
梁小龍，1948 年 4 月 28 日出生於中國廣東省中山市，籍貫中國山東省煙台市，香港男演員、武術家、武術指導、武打明星。

成長於香港一個貧寒的家庭，15 歲時進入武行，並開始做替身演員。20 世紀 70 年代就在香港演藝圈和李小龍、成龍、狄龍並稱為香港演藝圈“四小龍”。

2007 年，獲得中國功夫全球盛典“最佳動作男演員”獎。2010 年，在加拿大 Fantasia 國際電影節大會獲得“傳奇功夫巨星”獎。曾出演《大俠霍元甲》《陳真》紅遍大江南北。2014 年，梁小龍主演了電影《劍河》，這是一部內地版的《賽德克·巴萊》。

代表作品：《大俠霍元甲》《陳真》等。
data.name: 梁小龍

data.biography:
Kiara Beltran is a Mexican-American actress born and based out of Los Angeles. At a young age, she moved to Mexico where she spent the majority of her youth. She was provided the opportunity to travel and live in many different countries where she was able to speak English, Spanish, French and Portuguese. In 2017, she graduated with a Bachelors Degree in Fine Arts. She excels and enjoys basketball, swimming, mountain biking, horseback riding and singing.

Her career path began with an opportunity in modeling which has opened up different avenues for her acting career. In 2016 she had the opportunity to model in numerous fashion shows; one of them which was hold at Warner Bros. From 2014-2017 she acted in many short films, several of which have been selected for movie festivals. July (2017) she was awarded by Los Angeles Films Awards for Best Young Actress for the short film "Together Again" directed by Antonio Darwiche.
data.name: Kiara Beltran
